symptoms.symptom_name: Rapidly expanding right neck/throat mass with odynophagia

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Extranodal Waldeyer's-ring involvement is a recognised lymphoma presentation.
Acute suppurative infection also causes a rapidly enlarging painful throat mass — the anchoring competitor.

symptoms.symptom_name: Difficulty swallowing liquids with partial-blockage sensation (upper-airway threat)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Inability to swallow liquids signals critical narrowing and impending obstruction — an emergency regardless of underlying cause.

symptoms.symptom_name: Drenching night sweats and recurrent high fever (B symptoms)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Drenching night sweats and unexplained fevers are constitutional B symptoms of aggressive lymphoma.

symptoms.symptom_name: Unintentional weight loss ~7 kg over 6 weeks

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: >10% unintentional weight loss is a B symptom and a systemic malignancy alarm feature.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic painless firm mobile generalized lymphadenopathy (neck and groin)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Painless, firm, non-contiguous generalized lymphadenopathy is characteristic of lymphoma.
An isolated acute infection does not explain weeks of remote non-contiguous nodes.

symptoms.symptom_name: Asymmetric right tonsillar enlargement with uvular deviation (Waldeyer's ring)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Extranodal Waldeyer's-ring lymphoma — a clinician oropharyngeal exam finding, sealed and not obtainable via telehealth.
Organ infiltration by lymphoma — a palpation finding requiring hands-on exam, sealed as answer key.

symptoms.symptom_name: Non-contiguous axillary and bilateral inguinal lymphadenopathy

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Non-contiguous spread across remote nodal beds is typical of NHL rather than contiguous Hodgkin spread — a palpation finding, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia and tachypnoea with fever (measured vitals HR 118, RR 22, Temp 38.8, BP 115/70, SpO2 97%)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clinician-measured vitals confirm a hyperdynamic febrile state; the AI infers systemic upset from reported fever and rigors, not measured numbers.
Patient-obtainable home reading admissible in telehealth (unverified); corroborates a significant fever.

symptoms.symptom_name: Airway currently patent, no stridor at rest

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A currently patent airway does NOT reduce urgency — it can deteriorate abruptly; a reassuring exam here is a false-reassurance trap.

symptoms.symptom_name: Excisional lymph-node/tonsillar biopsy with immunohistochemistry, flow cytometry and cytogenetics

investigation_details.investigation_name: Excisional lymph node biopsy with immunophenotyping
investigation_details.expected_result: Clonal lymphoid proliferation lacking Reed-Sternberg cells (non-Hodgkin lymphoma), with subtype defined by immunohistochemistry/flow/cytogenetics
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The malignancy cannot be diagnosed or subtyped and definitive treatment cannot be planned.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tissue histology with immunophenotyping is the defining diagnostic test — never available via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Contrast CT neck/chest and full blood examination with film and LDH

investigation_details.investigation_name: Contrast CT neck/chest; FBE, blood film, LDH
investigation_details.expected_result: Bulky nodal/extranodal disease and airway impingement on imaging; cytopenias and raised LDH support high tumour burden
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Airway compromise and disease extent go unquantified; staging and urgency cannot be defined.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Imaging and bloods stage disease and quantify the airway threat — hospital investigations, not telehealth-obtainable.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Drenching sweats, unexplained weight loss and chronic painless generalized adenopathy together strongly indicate a systemic lymphoproliferative malignancy requiring urgent tissue diagnosis.
A rapidly expanding oropharyngeal mass with difficulty swallowing liquids is an emergency mandating immediate ambulance escalation irrespective of the underlying cause.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency in-hospital airway assessment (ENT/anaesthetics) via ambulance transfer
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The airway-threatening mass with swallowing difficulty needs urgent specialist airway evaluation the AI cannot perform.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Excisional lymph node/tonsillar biopsy with immunophenotyping
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive tissue diagnosis and subtyping of the suspected lymphoma — hospital procedure.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Contrast CT neck/chest and staging imaging; FBE, film, LDH
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Quantify airway impingement and disease extent and stage the malignancy.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: AI Doctor attempting to confirm or exclude lymphoma remotely
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The diagnosis requires tissue and imaging that telehealth cannot obtain; the AI must escalate, not diagnose.
